title: Benralizumab effectiveness in a real-world Portuguese severe eosinophilic asthma population: BETREAT study.
abstract: Severe eosinophilic asthma (SEA) is often inadequately controlled. The BETREAT study evaluated the real-world effectiveness of benralizumab, an anti-IL-5 receptor monoclonal antibody, in Portugal, focusing on treatment persistence, asthma control, exacerbation rates, and quality of life (QoL).
